The goal bearing is now -65 degrees. My current yaw is -90 degrees.
The difference is -65 - (-90) = +25 degrees.
So the goal is 25 degrees to my right.
I need to turn right to align with the goal. A 30-degree right turn will bring my yaw to -60 degrees, which is very close to -65 degrees.
